scripts.test:beta-scope: node ../../node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.cjs --runInBand src/auth/auth.service.spec.ts src/auth/guards/roles.guard.spec.ts src/appointments/appointments.service.spec.ts src/appointments/pro-appointments.controller.spec.ts src/discovery/discovery.service.spec.ts src/employee-portal/employee-portal.service.spec.ts src/pro-employees/pro-employees.service.spec.ts src/payment-methods/payment-methods.service.spec.ts src/payments/payments.service.spec.ts src/salon-settings/salon-settings.service.spec.ts src/admin/admin.service.spec.ts src/audit/audit.interceptor.spec.ts src/app.controller.spec.ts
scripts.start:dev: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/main.ts
scripts.start:test: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.test -- pnpm exec nest start --watch
scripts.start:demo: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.demo -- pnpm exec nest start --watch
scripts.db:studio: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec prisma studio
scripts.db:push:dev: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec prisma db push
scripts.db:push:test: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.test -- pnpm exec prisma db push
scripts.db:push:demo: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.demo -- pnpm exec prisma db push
scripts.seed:dev: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec ts-node prisma/seed/main.seed.ts
scripts.seed:test: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.test --set=SEED_SCENARIO=test -- pnpm exec ts-node prisma/seed/main.seed.ts
scripts.seed:demo: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.demo -- pnpm exec ts-node prisma/seed/main.seed.ts
scripts.reset:dev: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --force && pnpm seed:dev
scripts.reset:test: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.test -- pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --force && pnpm seed:test
scripts.reset:demo: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.demo -- pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --force && pnpm seed:demo
scripts.check:pro:dev: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec ts-node scripts/checks/check-pro-suite.ts
scripts.check:pro:test: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.test -- pnpm exec ts-node scripts/checks/check-pro-suite.ts
scripts.check:pro:demo: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.demo -- pnpm exec ts-node scripts/checks/check-pro-suite.ts
scripts.check:pro:crud:dev: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env -- pnpm exec ts-node scripts/checks/check-pro-crud-suite.ts
scripts.check:pro:crud:test: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.test -- pnpm exec ts-node scripts/checks/check-pro-crud-suite.ts
scripts.check:pro:crud:demo: node scripts/with-env.cjs .env.demo -- pnpm exec ts-node scripts/checks/check-pro-crud-suite.ts
scripts.check:pro:full:test: pnpm reset:test && pnpm check:pro:test && pnpm reset:test && pnpm check:pro:crud:test && pnpm reset:test
